debug_info.goal:
Hist : History
X : Sequent
tab : Tableau Hist X
Hist✝ : History
X✝ : Sequent
nrep✝ : ¬rep Hist✝ X✝
nbas✝ : ¬X✝.basic
lt✝ : LocalTableau X✝
next✝ : (Y : Sequent) → Y ∈ endNodesOf lt✝ → Tableau (X✝ :: Hist✝) Y
Y✝ : Sequent
Y_in✝ : Y✝ ∈ endNodesOf lt✝
tail✝ : PathIn (next✝ Y✝ Y_in✝)
IH : tail✝.flip.flip = ⋯ ▸ cast ⋯ tail✝
⊢ loc ⋯ (cast ⋯ (cast ⋯ tail✝.flip).flip) = ⋯ ▸ cast ⋯ (loc Y_in✝ tail✝)

proof:
rename_i Hist X nrep nbas lt next Y Y_in tail
    apply eq_of_heq
    apply HEq.symm
    apply HEq.trans (eqRec_heq _ _)
    apply HEq.trans (cast_heq _ _)
    apply HEq.symm
    have flip_congr_heq : ∀ {H1 H2 : History} {X1 X2 : Sequent}
        {t1 : Tableau H1 X1} {t2 : Tableau H2 X2}
        (_ : H1 = H2) (_ : X1 = X2) (_ : HEq t1 t2)
        {p1 : PathIn t1} {p2 : PathIn t2},
        HEq p1 p2 → HEq p1.flip p2.flip := by
      intro H1 H2 X1 X2 t1 t2 hH hX ht p1 p2 hp
      subst hH; subst hX
      have : t1 = t2 := eq_of_heq ht
      subst this
      exact heq_of_eq (congrArg _ (eq_of_heq hp))
    convert @HEq.refl _ (PathIn.loc Y_in tail) using 2
    case h.e'_1.h.e'_1 => simp
    case h.e'_1.h.e'_2 => simp
    case h.e'_1.h.e'_3 => rw [Tableau.flip_flip]; grind
    case h.e'_2.e'_1 => simp
    case h.e'_2.e'_2 => simp
    case h.e'_2.e'_5 => rw [LocalTableau.flip_flip]; grind
    case h.e'_2.e'_7 => simp
    case h.e'_2.e'_6 =>
      refine Function.hfunext rfl ?_
      intro Y' Y'' Y_eq
      apply Function.hfunext (by subst Y_eq; grind)
      intro Y_in' Y_in'' _
      subst Y_eq
      have tab_ff := @Tableau.flip_flip _ _ (next Y' Y_in'')
      rw! (castMode := .all) [@Sequent.flip_flip Y']
      simp_all
    case h.e'_2.e'_9 =>
      apply HEq.trans (cast_heq _ _)
      apply HEq.trans
      · exact flip_congr_heq (by simp) (by simp)
          (by grind [Tableau.flip_flip]) (cast_heq _ _)
      · rw [IH]; exact (eqRec_heq _ _).trans (cast_heq _ _)
successful_attempts:
rename_i Hist X nrep nbas lt next Y Y_in tail
    apply eq_of_heq
    apply HEq.symm
    apply HEq.trans (eqRec_heq _ _)
    apply HEq.trans (cast_heq _ _)
    apply HEq.symm
    have flip_congr_heq : ∀ {H1 H2 : History} {X1 X2 : Sequent}
        {t1 : Tableau H1 X1} {t2 : Tableau H2 X2}
        (_ : H1 = H2) (_ : X1 = X2) (_ : HEq t1 t2)

      intro H1 H2 X1 X2 t1 t2 hH hX ht p1 p2 hp
      subst hH; subst hX
      have : t1 = t2 := eq_of_heq ht
      subst this
      exact heq_of_eq (congrArg _ (eq_of_heq hp))
    convert @HEq.refl _ (PathIn.loc Y_in tail) using 2
    case h.e'_1.h.e'_1 => simp
    case h.e'_1.h.e'_2 => simp
    case h.e'_1.h.e'_3 => rw [Tableau.flip_flip]; grind
    case h.e'_2.e'_1 => simp
    case h.e'_2.e'_2 => simp
    case h.e'_2.e'_5 => rw [LocalTableau.flip_flip]; grind
    case h.e'_2.e'_7 => simp
    case h.e'_2.e'_6 =>
      refine Function.hfunext rfl ?_
      intro Y' Y'' Y_eq
      apply Function.hfunext (by subst Y_eq; grind)
      intro Y_in' Y_in'' _
      subst Y_eq
      have tab_ff := @Tableau.flip_flip _ _ (next Y' Y_in'')
      rw! (castMode := .all) [@Sequent.flip_flip Y']
      simp_all
    case h.e'_2.e'_9 =>
      apply HEq.trans (cast_heq _ _)
      apply HEq.trans
      · exact flip_congr_heq (by simp) (by simp)
          (by grind [Tableau.flip_flip]) (cast_heq _ _)
      · rw [IH]; exact (eqRec_heq _ _).trans (cast_heq _ _)
